forms.title: Income Certificate Application
forms.description: Apply for verified government Income Certificate under E-Sevai services.
forms.instructions:
1. Family income must be less than 72,000 for urban and rural areas.
2. Upload clear scanned copy of original Aadhaar card.
3. Make sure active income certificate details match smart card entries.

forms.title: New PAN Card / Correction
forms.description: Official NSDL / UTITSL PAN card application service.
forms.fields: [{"id":"full_name","label":"Full Name as per Aadhaar","type":"text","required":true},{"id":"father_name","label":"Father's Full Name","type":"text","required":true},{"id":"gender","label":"Gender","type":"select","required":true,"options":["Male","Female","Other"]},{"id":"pancard_type","label":"Application Type","type":"select","required":true,"options":["New PAN Card","PAN Correction","Lost PAN Card Reissue"]}]
forms.instructions:
1. Full name must match Aadhaar card spelling exactly.
2. Ensure date of birth matches the uploaded age proof.
3. Mobile number should be linked to Aadhaar for e-KYC verification.

forms.title: Voter ID Registration Form
forms.description: Register as a new voter or apply for changes in Assembly voting record.
forms.instructions:
1. Minimum age criteria: Applicant must have completed 18 years.
2. Address should be in current voting constituency bounds.
3. Verify mother's and father's names matching family voter IDs.

forms.title: community certificate
forms.description: the commmunity certificate application for the tamil nadu  e sevai service

posts.title: E-Sevai Quick Services
posts.description: Apply for Income Certificate, Community Certificate, and Nativity Certificate easily through our portal. Processing time: 3-5 working days.

posts.title: New PAN Card & Corrections
posts.description: Get a new PAN Card in 7 working days or make corrections in your existing PAN Card (Name, DOB, or Photo) with simple document submission.

posts.title: Voter ID Registration
posts.description: New Voter Registration, address updates, or replacement voter ID card applications are active. Track status securely.

posts.title: Latest News & Service Updates
posts.description: Stay updated with the latest service additions, server maintenance windows, and application updates for TN sevai portal.
